title: the animalistic nature of the eva units
display_title: the animalistic nature of the eva units
wikitext:
[]: the animalistic nature of the eva units Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:30 pm what causes it? heres my theory, when making the evas, they gave them animalistic instincts. do you think animal DNA was used in the evas? or was adam just very animalistic in the first place? and would the other evas act in the same way? discuss these theories.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:41 pm Unless I'm terribly mistaken, Evas are humans, and humans have animalistic instincts, being animals. (Though, Adam would be an animal of an alien sort.) But lest I end up repeating things I and various others said already, you might be better off thumbing through (or perhaps chowing down on) this first. The Evas' weird behavior is considered from various angles. Interesting stuff. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6615
